text:
Six PRs merged this week. mostly under-the-hood routing and dashboard cleanup, but a few things you'll actually notice: Nova Reel input handles longer videos without tripping, and Qwen TTS audio requests route smarter now. we also cleaned up the dashboard sidebar and added proper rectangular tags for non-button labels so things look less chaotic. model-wise: ElevenLabs and GPT Image 2 are now part of the paid pollen ecosystem, but Scribe stays entirely free. code is open on github as always. 🌸

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #uiux #generativeai
